idea-plugin.name: Git Worktree Hub
idea-plugin.description:
Manage Git worktrees from within JetBrains IDEs. List, add, remove, and open Git worktrees directly from the IDE without leaving your workflow. Features include:
  • View all worktrees for your repository in a dedicated tool window
  • Create new worktrees with branch selection
  • Remove worktrees with safety checks
  • Open worktrees in new IDE windows
  • Automatic refresh when switching projects
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.10:
  • Improved worktree display names to show shortest unique path instead of just folder name.
  • Worktrees with common suffixes (for example, /src) now display distinguishing parent folders.

action.description: Show Git Worktree Manager tool window
